name: TMKOC RPG (with lorebook)
description:
Step into Gokuldham Society like never before.
The residents - Babita, Anjali, Madhavi, Komal, Roshan, Daya, plus Tapu Sena - all live, breathe, gossip, flirt, and react to you, the new mysterious neighbor who just moved in.

Comedy, drama, jealousy, romance, secret crushes, forbidden temptation…
Every choice you make changes how they see you.

Welcome to the TMKOC RPG.
One society. Endless stories.
And everyone wants to meet you.
creator: LEO_021
